workflow_rationale: Multi-service feature requiring backend serverless functions, frontend tracking integration, and external API integrations (SendGrid, Twilio). Follows standard feature workflow: foundation → integrations → business logic → automation.

phases.name: Lead Tracking Foundation
phases.description: Build lead storage utilities and tracking service to capture estimate events and lead states

subtasks.description: Create lead storage utility for tracking lead states in localStorage
subtasks.notes: Follow localStorage pattern from webhook-handler. Track: lead_id, email, phone, consent_email, consent_sms, estimate_created_at, estimate_amount, last_contact, status (new, contacted, converted, unsubscribed)

subtasks.description: Create LeadNurtureService to coordinate lead tracking and campaign triggers

verification.command: node -e "const {LeadNurtureService} = require('./src/services/lead-nurture-service.js'); const s = new LeadNurtureService(); console.log(s ? 'OK' : 'FAIL')"

subtasks.notes: Service class pattern. Methods: trackEstimate(estimateData), trackBooking(bookingData), shouldNurture(leadId), getNurtureQueue()

subtasks.description: Integrate lead tracking into EstimateService to capture new leads

verification.instructions: Create test estimate via estimate form, verify lead is stored in localStorage under 'nurture_leads' key with timestamp and status='new'

subtasks.notes: Added trackLead(), getLeads(), getLeadById(), updateLeadStatus() methods. Automatic tracking when contactInfo provided in calculateEstimate() options. All tests passing.

phases.name: Email/SMS API Integration
phases.description: Create Vercel serverless functions to send emails via SendGrid and SMS via Twilio

subtasks.description: Create environment config file with API keys placeholders
subtasks.notes: Required vars: SENDGRID_API_KEY, SENDGRID_FROM_EMAIL, TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, TWILIO_FROM_PHONE

subtasks.description: Create SendGrid email API serverless function
subtasks.notes: Created api/nurture/send-email.js with Vercel serverless function pattern. Implements 3 templates (abandoned_estimate, booking_confirmation, review_request) with HTML/text versions, validation, error handling, and unsubscribe links. Package installation pending in subtask-2-4.

subtasks.description: Create Twilio SMS API serverless function
subtasks.notes: Created api/nurture/send-sms.js with Vercel serverless function pattern. Implements SMS templates (abandoned_estimate, booking_confirmation, review_request, custom), E.164 phone validation, message length validation (160 single/1600 max), consent checking via consentSms param, STOP keyword handling, Twilio error mapping, and incoming SMS webhook handler. Package installation pending in subtask-2-4.

subtasks.description: Install email/SMS dependencies
subtasks.notes: Added @sendgrid/mail@^8.1.4 and twilio@^5.3.7 to package.json. Local npm install blocked by proxy, but packages will install in Vercel deployment environment.

phases.name: Consent Management
phases.description: Build opt-in/opt-out consent tracking and unsubscribe handling

subtasks.description: Create ConsentService for managing email/SMS opt-in preferences

verification.command: node -e "const {ConsentService} = require('./src/services/consent-service.js'); const s = new ConsentService(); console.log(s ? 'OK' : 'FAIL')"

subtasks.notes: Implemented ConsentService with all required methods: grantConsent, revokeConsent, hasConsent, recordUnsubscribe. Additional helper methods: getConsentRecords, getConsentRecord, getLeadsWithConsent, getConsentStats, clearAllConsents. Stores in localStorage 'consent_records' with timestamps and metadata. Verification passed.

subtasks.description: Create unsubscribe handler API endpoint
subtasks.notes: Created Vercel serverless function to handle unsubscribe requests. Accepts GET requests with lead ID and type (email/sms) parameters. Validates input, records unsubscribe events to file-based storage (/tmp/unsubscribes.jsonl), and returns user-friendly HTML confirmation page. Follows the same patterns as send-email.js and send-sms.js for consistency.

subtasks.description: Add consent checkboxes to estimate form
subtasks.notes: Added Communication Preferences section with email (emailOptIn) and SMS (smsOptIn) checkboxes. Includes comprehensive CSS styling in src/styles/estimate-form.css with responsive design. Section placed before Form Actions. Checkboxes are optional and include privacy policy link and opt-out information.

phases.name: Nurture Campaign Logic
phases.description: Build automated campaign triggers for abandoned estimates, booking confirmations, and review requests

subtasks.description: Create abandoned estimate checker serverless function
subtasks.notes: Implemented Vercel serverless function with file-based storage, dry-run mode, batch processing, and comprehensive error handling. Production requires backend database (Vercel KV/PostgreSQL) to replace file storage. Verification passed: returns 200 status with detailed summary.

subtasks.description: Create booking confirmation trigger in webhook handler

verification.instructions: Simulate Calendly booking webhook event, verify email sent to customer with booking details

subtasks.notes: Added sendBookingConfirmation() method to WebhookHandler. Modified handleEventScheduled() to send booking confirmation email with customer details (name, event type, time, location, cancel/reschedule URLs). Created comprehensive test suite and manual verification script.

subtasks.description: Create post-job review request checker
subtasks.notes: Implemented Vercel serverless function following exact pattern from check-abandoned.js. Filters leads with status='converted', job_completed_at >7 days old, and email consent. Sends review_request email template and marks review_request_sent_at timestamp. Includes dry-run mode, batch processing (default 50), file-based storage (/tmp/nurture_leads.json). Production requires backend database. Returns detailed summary with total_leads, eligible_found, emails_sent, failed, skipped.

subtasks.description: Create email templates configuration
subtasks.notes: Created api/nurture/templates.js with centralized email template definitions. Includes three templates (abandoned_estimate, booking_confirmation, review_request) each with subject, HTML, and plain text versions. All templates include unsubscribe links and dynamic data interpolation (firstName, estimateAmount, appointmentDate, etc.). Exported as ES module with default export and named exports for convenience. Node.js automatically handles ES module to CommonJS interop for require(). Verification passed.

phases.name: Analytics Integration
phases.description: Track nurture campaign performance and integrate with analytics

subtasks.description: Create analytics tracking API endpoint for nurture events
subtasks.notes: Created Vercel serverless function to track nurture analytics events. Implements validation for 7 event types (email_sent, email_opened, email_clicked, sms_sent, sms_delivered, unsubscribed, converted) and 4 campaign types. Stores events in JSONL format at /tmp/nurture_events.jsonl with timestamp and metadata. Includes queryEvents() helper for analytics queries. All tests passing with 200 status for valid requests, proper error handling for invalid inputs.

subtasks.description: Integrate nurture tracking into existing analytics (trackEvent)

verification.instructions: Check browser console for gtag events when nurture emails are sent

subtasks.notes: Added setupNurtureHandlers() method to WebhookHandler with 7 event handlers (email_sent, email_opened, email_clicked, sms_sent, sms_delivered, unsubscribed, converted). Each handler calls trackEvent() with event_category: 'nurture' for Google Analytics integration. Updated trackEvent() method to support flexible event categories. All events logged to console and tracked via window.gtag when available.

subtasks.description: Create nurture analytics dashboard data API
subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive analytics API endpoint. Returns summary stats (total_leads, emails_sent, sms_sent, conversions, conversion_rate, unsubscribe_rate), engagement metrics (open/click/delivery rates), campaign breakdown, lead status distribution, and consent statistics. Supports optional query params for filtering by date range and campaign. Uses file-based storage (/tmp) consistent with other nurture endpoints. Verification passed: imports successfully.

phases.name: Automation Setup
phases.description: Configure Vercel Cron jobs to run periodic checks for abandoned estimates and review requests

subtasks.description: Create Vercel Cron configuration in vercel.json
subtasks.notes: Added crons array with two jobs: check-abandoned (0 10 * * * - daily at 10am UTC), check-review-requests (0 14 * * * - daily at 2pm UTC). Both cron jobs point to their respective API endpoints /api/nurture/check-abandoned and /api/nurture/check-review-requests. Verification passed.

subtasks.description: Add cron authentication/security to API endpoints

verification.instructions: Call cron endpoint without Authorization header, verify 401 response

subtasks.notes: Added verifyCronAuth() function to both cron endpoints. Validates req.headers.authorization against CRON_SECRET env var. Returns 401 Unauthorized if missing/invalid. Supports 'Bearer <token>' format. All tests passing.

subtasks.description: Create documentation for environment setup and deployment

verification.command: test -f docs/LEAD_NURTURE.md && grep -q 'Environment Variables' docs/LEAD_NURTURE.md && echo 'OK' || echo 'FAIL'

subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive documentation covering environment setup, API integration setup (SendGrid/Twilio), cron configuration, testing, deployment, monitoring, compliance, and troubleshooting. Includes template customization guide and production migration strategies.

phases.name: End-to-End Integration
phases.description: Wire all components together and verify complete nurture flow from estimate to follow-up

subtasks.description: End-to-end test: abandoned estimate flow

steps: Create estimate via form with email consent checked
Verify lead stored in localStorage with status='new'
Verify email API called with abandoned_estimate template

subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive E2E test infrastructure: browser-based interactive test (HTML), command-line automated test (Node.js), and complete documentation. Tests validate entire flow from estimate creation to email delivery. Supports dry-run and live modes. Added npm script: test:e2e:abandoned

subtasks.description: End-to-end test: booking confirmation flow

steps: Verify email sent with booking_confirmation template
Verify SMS sent if phone consent exists

subtasks.description: End-to-end test: consent and unsubscribe flow

steps: Verify NO email sent to unsubscribed lead

parallel_groups.reason: Both depend only on phase-1-foundation, operate on different file sets

parallelism.speedup_estimate: 1.2x faster with parallel execution of phases 2 and 3

acceptance_criteria: Abandoned estimates receive follow-up emails after 24 hours
Booking confirmations send immediately upon Calendly event
Review requests send 3 days after job completion
All messaging respects opt-in consent preferences
Unsubscribe links work and prevent future messaging
Analytics track all nurture events (sent, opened, clicked, converted)
No emails/SMS sent without explicit consent

verification_steps.name: Integration Tests
verification_steps.expected_outcome: All API endpoints return expected responses

verification_steps.name: E2E Nurture Flow Tests
verification_steps.command: Manually execute E2E steps in phase-7 subtasks

verification_steps.name: Secrets Scan
verification_steps.command: grep -r 'SENDGRID_API_KEY\|TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN' --include='*.js' src/ api/ || echo 'No secrets found'
verification_steps.expected_outcome: No hardcoded API keys in source code

verification_steps.name: Consent Verification
verification_steps.command: Manual verification of opt-in checkboxes and unsubscribe flow
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Users can opt in/out, and preferences are respected

verification_strategy.reasoning: High risk due to email/SMS automation (legal compliance required), external API integrations, and consent management. Requires thorough testing and staging deployment before production.

commands: Manual E2E verification per phase-7 subtasks
